mnemonics: WHILE Loops: Wait, Handle, Iterate, Loop, Exit
keyPoints: A 'while' loop executes a block of code repeatedly as long as a given condition is true
The condition is checked at the beginning of each iteration, before the code block runs
It is crucial to have a statement inside the loop that eventually makes the condition false to avoid infinite loops
commonMistakes: Forgetting to update the loop control variable inside the block, leading to an infinite loop
Using an assignment operator (=) instead of an equality operator (==) in the condition, which always evaluates to true
